threadedComment.text: Technical Details for the Self-Study part: 1. [2-1-django-project-structure-and-configuration.md] - Create a new Django project called AirAssistBackend 2. [2-3-django-models-and-database-integration.md] - Create a Database in PostgresSQL called AirAssist - Create Table Users[userId, roleId, firstName, lastName, email, password] - Create Table Roles[roleId, role]. Role is a string withe the following options: System_Admin, Colleague, Passenger -Configure Project to use PostgresSQL - Create a model for User - Create a model for Role 3. [2-4-django-orm.md] - Add a method to create a user - Add a method to get the role of a specific user 4. [2-5-django-rest-framework.md] - Create a POST endpoint that creates a new user: POST /user valid body → 201 {userId, roleId, firstName, lastName, email} - Create a GET endpoint that returns the role for a specific user: GET /user/1 valid body → 200 {roleId, role} 5. [2-7-django-authentication-and-authorization] - setup JWT authentication for the project - Create A login page with two inputs (email, password) that allows a user to login. The page will display a text 'Success' if the loggin is successful, or fobidden otherwise. - Create a permission is_system_admin that allows admin users to create a new users and include this permission for the endpoint: POST /user - A regular user can only use the the endpoint: GET /user/<id> 6. [3-0-special-topics.md] - Change. the creation endpoint so that the users receives upon creation an email with is details: userId, roleId, firstName, lastName, email and password

This Story will be implemented in Phase 1 - Focus Self-Learning (minus the change password functionality - that will come later)
The objective of the story is to have a functioning project skeleton when you start work on the project (Phase 2)
Trebuie intrebat ce se intampla cu "case"urile asignate unui user
